about_me.en: I am Zhiwei Yang, a third-year master student from Xiamen University, advised by Professor Zhirong Shen. I am a KV storage researcher. My research focus is index for memory system. I am so excited about the learned index.
about_me.zh: 我是杨志伟，来自厦门大学计算机技术专业的三年级硕士研究生，导师是沈志荣教授。我是一名KV存储研究员。我的研究重点是内存系统的索引。我对学习索引非常感兴趣。

en.major: Computer Science and Technology, Zhejiang Sci-Tech University

zh.major: 浙江理工大学计算机科学与技术
